faqs.question: Why are flies such a problem in University Heights apartments?
faqs.answer: University Heights' older building stock, active street life, and proximity to restaurants and food vendors create multiple entry points and attractants for flies. Shared garbage areas, aging window screens, and gaps around doors in pre-war buildings make fly control especially important in this neighborhood.
